summary: Excel Import/Export with Before/After Comparison Feature - All 15 tests passed. Programs and SCI import endpoints correctly capture snapshots before import, detect field-by-field changes using composite key (brand+model+trim+year), store comparisons in MongoDB import_comparisons collection, and return comparison details in API response. Export endpoints return valid xlsx files. Comparison history endpoints return sorted records.
critical_code_review_comments: programs.py import_programs_excel(): Correctly captures all_before snapshot using composite key (brand|model|trim|year), calculates field-by-field diffs for consumer_cash, alternative_consumer_cash, bonus_cash, option1_rates, option2_rates
sci.py import_sci_lease_excel(): Correctly uses deep copy for data_before snapshot, compares lease_cash, alternative_lease_cash, standard_rates, alternative_rates
Both imports store comparison_doc in db.import_comparisons with id, type, date, updated/unchanged counts, and details array
Response correctly includes comparison_id and comparison array with avant/apres values for each changed field
GET /api/programs/comparisons and /api/sci/comparisons correctly filter by type and sort by date descending
GET /api/programs/comparison/{id} correctly returns specific comparison with all details
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data, all changes reverted after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Excel import/export with comparison feature fully tested. All endpoints working correctly: POST /api/programs/import-excel (with/without changes), GET /api/programs/export-excel, GET /api/programs/comparisons, GET /api/programs/comparison/{id}, POST /api/sci/import-excel, GET /api/sci/export-excel, GET /api/sci/comparisons. Composite key matching (brand+model+trim+year) working for programs. Tests use openpyxl to modify Excel files and verify comparison responses.

verified_endpoints.GET /api/programs/export-excel: 200 OK - Returns valid xlsx with 81 programs
verified_endpoints.POST /api/programs/import-excel: 200 OK - Returns updated/unchanged counts and comparison details
verified_endpoints.GET /api/programs/comparisons: 200 OK - Returns history of 5+ comparisons sorted by date desc
verified_endpoints.GET /api/programs/comparison/{id}: 200 OK - Returns specific comparison with details
verified_endpoints.GET /api/sci/export-excel: 200 OK - Returns valid xlsx with Lease 2026/2025 sheets
verified_endpoints.POST /api/sci/import-excel: 200 OK - Returns updated/unchanged counts and comparison details
verified_endpoints.GET /api/sci/comparisons: 200 OK - Returns history of SCI comparisons sorted by date desc

programs_import.before_snapshot: Captures all programs with composite key (brand|model|trim|year)
programs_import.change_detection: Compares consumer_cash, alternative_consumer_cash, bonus_cash, option1_rates, option2_rates
programs_import.response: Returns comparison_id, updated count, unchanged count, comparison array with avant/apres

sci_import.before_snapshot: Uses deep copy of current data
sci_import.response: Returns comparison_id, updated count, unchanged count, comparison array with avant/apres
